name: Noel Seeker
description: Noel Seeker (ノエル・シーカー), romanised by Falcom as Noël Seeker, is a member of the Special Support Section and a Second Lieutenant of the Crossbell Guardian Force. During Crossbell's short-lived period of independence, Noel served as a Second Lieutenant in the Crossbell Defense Force. She is the older sister of Fran Seeker. Background up to Reverie
creator: notRazio
